posts.author: Michaelvw (Michael Van Wyk)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, It will be great if we can have the ability to create more than one subitem column per board. Currently we are restricted to 1 column. This will greatly expand the options we have and reduce the amount of boards we have to use to gather all the information we need in one place.
